name: Djose Cloister of Trials
steps: Push the pedestal holding the Djose Sphere under the upside-down pedestal to super-charge the sphere.
Push the pedestal (now with two Djose Spheres) into the lightning-filled room — it becomes a suspended platform. Leap across.
Take the super-charged Djose Sphere from the slot to the right of the door and place it into the slot to the left.
Locate the glowing spot on the west wall near the floor switch — examine it to reveal a glyph.
Insert the super-charged Djose Sphere into the slot to the right of the central door to open a pit room.
Push the pedestal on the other side of the lightning to activate the 'iris' symbol in the main chamber.
The completed floor symbol turns the pedestal into an elevator. Ride it up to the next level.
Touch the glyph to open the wall — take the Destruction Sphere, then return to the upper level via the magic lift.
Remove the two Djose Spheres from the eastern wall and place them both on the pedestal.
Jump back to the main room and use the west floor switch to extract the pedestal from the lightning.
On the upper level, push all five pedestals into the walls to activate the five ceiling spokes.
Place the Destruction Sphere into the central pedestal — a section of the east wall is destroyed, revealing a treasure chest (Magistral Rod).
Take a Djose Sphere and insert it into either slot on the east platform to unlock the final path. Follow the stairs to the Chamber of the Fayth.
